app.title: LCDLLN
faction.lumiere.desc: A sacred order sworn to purify the world with light and steel.
class.lumiere.archer.desc: Precise, mobile ranged shooter. Resource: Breath.
class.lumiere.voleur.desc: Stealthy and lethal in close combat. Resource: Reflexes.
class.lumiere.inquisiteur_chatieur.desc: Offensive inquisitor who smites heretics in melee. Resource: Fervor.
class.lumiere.inquisiteur_hospitalier.de: Healing inquisitor who shields allies. Resource: Fervor.
faction.justice.desc: Knights who deliver justice and judge the guilty without fail.
class.justice.archer.desc: Precise, mobile ranged shooter. Resource: Breath.
class.justice.paladin.desc: Holy champion blending offense and protection. Resource: Fervor.
class.justice.pretre_jugement.desc: Offensive caster who strikes in the name of justice. Resource: Fervor.
class.justice.pretre_grace.desc: Devoted healer who restores and blesses allies. Resource: Fervor.
faction.lune_noire.desc: A secret cult drawing its power from the lunar shadows.
class.lune_noire.arbaletrier.desc: Ranged shooter armed with a heavy crossbow. Resource: Breath.
class.lune_noire.pretre_lune_noire.desc: Devout caster of the Black Moon rites. Resource: Devotion.
class.lune_noire.menthats.desc: Learned caster wielding forbidden arcana. Resource: Magic.
faction.dzorak.desc: A fierce orc tribe forged by survival and ancestral spirits.
class.dzorak.chaman.desc: Caster who channels ancestral spirits. Resource: Trance.
class.dzorak.archer.desc: Precise, mobile ranged shooter. Resource: Breath.
class.dzorak.pisteur.desc: Wild tracker who masters the terrain. Resource: Instinct.
faction.legion.desc: A demonic horde hungering for conquest and corruption.
class.legion.demoniste.desc: Caster who enslaves demonic forces. Resource: Corruption.
class.legion.tourmenteur.desc: Melee tormentor who feeds on suffering. Resource: Corruption.
class.legion.sorcier_sang.desc: Caster who sacrifices blood for power. Resource: Corruption.
faction.dragons.desc: Knights bound to dragons, keepers of the draconic flame.
class.dragons.archimage.desc: Caster who unleashes dragonfire. Resource: Dragonflame.
class.dragons.dragonnier.desc: Melee fighter carried by draconic fury. Resource: Dragonfury.
class.dragons.gardien_ecailles.desc: Unbreakable tank clad in draconic scales. Resource: Scale.
faction.serpent.desc: A cunning house wielding arcana and intrigue from the shadows.
class.serpent.archimage.desc: Caster mastering destructive arcana. Resource: Base Magic.
class.serpent.assassin.desc: Stealthy killer who strikes a single lethal blow. Resource: Reflexes.
class.serpent.mage.desc: Versatile caster of the magical arts. Resource: Base Magic.
faction.naine.desc: A sturdy dwarven people, masters of forge and stone.
class.naine.pisteur.desc: Tenacious tracker, expert of the tunnels. Resource: Instinct.
class.naine.mage.desc: Versatile caster of the magical arts. Resource: Base Magic.
class.naine.brise_roc.desc: Unyielding tank who shatters rock and foe alike. Resource: Stamina.
faction.elfe.desc: An ancient elven people in harmony with nature and arcana.
class.elfe.archer_bois.desc: Woodland archer, precise and silent. Resource: Breath.
class.elfe.voleur_tenebreux.desc: Shadow blade, stealthy and lethal. Resource: Reflexes.
class.elfe.mage.desc: Versatile caster of the magical arts. Resource: Base Magic.
language.first_run.title: Language selection
language.first_run.message: We detected {language}. Confirm your language before login.
language.first_run.confirm: Press Enter to confirm and continue to authentication.
language.first_run.info_popup: You can change this later in Options : Language.
language.options.title: Options
options.menu.hint_root: Enter opens section  arrows or wheel
options.menu.hint_submenu: Left/Right adjust  Escape or Back for menu
options.video.title: Video
options.audio.title: Audio
options.controls.title: Controls
options.game.title: Game
auth.shard_pick.panel_subtitle: Each world has its own population, rules, and events.
auth.shard_pick.footer_info: You can change realms later via the inter-world travel portal (gold fee).
auth.shard_pick.none_online: No realms available at the moment.
auth.shard_pick.hint: Multiple worlds are online. Click a row or use the arrow keys, then Submit.
auth.shard_pick.popup_help: Select which world (shard) to join, then press Submit.
auth.error.shard_pick_required: Please select a server from the list.
auth.footer_hint.login_bar: TAB NEXT FIELD    |    OK SIGN IN    |    ESC QUIT
auth.login.remember_detail: KEEPS YOUR USERNAME FOR THE NEXT LAUNCH
auth.register.panel_subtitle: FORGE YOUR IDENTITY IN THE LANDS OF THE BLACK MOON
auth.error.register_info_popup: This screen illustrates registration error cases. In-game, the message matches the server response or local validation.
auth.error.variant.taken.banner_msg: Another adventurer already bears this name. Pick another one.
auth.error.variant.taken.fix: Try a variant: add a digit or a suffix (e.g. ' MORWENNA-OF-THE-NORTH ').
auth.error.variant.weak.banner_msg: At least 8 characters, with uppercase, digit and special character.
auth.error.variant.weak.fix: Use at least: 1 uppercase, 1 digit, 1 symbol.
auth.error.variant.email.banner_msg: The email address format is not recognized.
auth.error.variant.network.banner_msg: The master server is not responding. Check your connection.
auth.error.variant.network.fix: Try again in a few moments, or check status.lcdlln.fr.
auth.tooltip.birth_day: Scroll the wheel or use Up/Down while focused. Day 1-31 (calendar check on submit).
auth.verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}.
auth.verify.info_popup: The code expires in 15 minutes. Check your spam folder too.
auth.verify.dev_hint: Tip: use ' 123456 ' to simulate success, ' 000000 ' to simulate an error.
auth.error.enter_register_fields: Enter all required fields: login, password, email, first name, last name, birth date, and country.
auth.error.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
auth.error.invalid_birth_date: Birth date must use valid numeric day/month/year values.
auth.error.enter_verify_code: Enter the verification code from the email.
auth.error.invalid_verify_code: Verification code must contain exactly 6 digits.
auth.error.enter_recovery_email: Enter the email address for password recovery.
auth.error.accept_terms: Scroll to the end of the terms, then check the acknowledgement box.
auth.error.invalid_character_name: Character name must be 3-32 characters and use only letters, digits, or underscore.
auth.error.open_recovery_portal: Unable to open the password recovery portal.
auth.error.character_session_inactive: Character creation session is not active.
auth.error.already_logged_in: An active session already exists with this login. If this is not you, contact support and change your password immediately.
auth.info.register_ok: Registration OK. Enter the verification code sent by email.
auth.email_confirmation.title: Registration successful
auth.email_confirmation.message:
A confirmation email has been sent to you.
Please click the link in the email
to activate your account.
auth.email_confirmation.banner_ok_body: Check your email and click the confirmation link, or enter the code you received below.
auth.email_confirmation.code_expired: The verification code has expired. Click below to receive a new one.
auth.info.email_resent: A new verification code has been sent to your email address.
auth.tooltip.country: Your country of residence (ISO 2-letter code). Used for your unique TAG-ID.
auth.info.email_verified: Email verified. You can now log in.
auth.info.forgot_password: If the email exists, a reset message has been sent.
auth.info.terms_done: All terms accepted. Choose your character name.
auth.info.character_cancelled: Character creation cancelled. Back to login.
auth.info.server_unavailable: Server unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
auth.hint.character.rules: 3 to 32 characters. Letters, digits, and underscore.
auth.character_select.panel_subtitle: Pick the character you want to enter the world with, or create a new one.
auth.character_select.hint: Click a character or use arrow keys, then Play.
auth.character_select.empty: No characters on this realm yet.
auth.panel.title: Title
auth.status.unavailable: Servers under maintenance. Please try again in a moment.
auth.status.network_error: Cannot reach the status server (network, firewall, or URL). Check the address, port 3842, and that the master is running.
auth.tooltip.login: Your unique login to connect to the game. 3 to 32 characters, letters and digits only.
auth.tooltip.password: Your password. Minimum 8 characters, at least one letter and one digit (server policy).
auth.tooltip.password_confirm: Enter the same password again to avoid typos.
auth.tooltip.email: Valid email address for account verification and password recovery.
auth.tooltip.first_name: Your first name as it will appear on your player profile.
auth.tooltip.last_name: Your last name for account identification.
auth.tooltip.country: Your country of residence (ISO 2-letter code). Used for the TAG-ID.
auth.info.login_help: Enter your login and password to sign in. If you forgot your password, use the "Forgot password" link.
auth.info.register_help: Login must be 3 to 20 alphanumeric characters. Password must be at least 8 characters. Date of birth is required.
options.imgui.quality_hint: Ultra requires a recent graphics card.
options.imgui.account_placeholder: Account: use the login / account screens.
options.imgui.hint.zqsd: Use ZQSD instead of WASD for movement.
options.imgui.hint.mouse_sensitivity_pct: Sensitivity from 10 pct to 100 pct (classic menu also supports mouse wheel on the row).
options.imgui.lang_restart_hint: A restart may be required for some languages.
options.account.password_need_login: Return to the login screen to change your password.
options.account.email_hint: Email change will be offered in a future version.
